title: ObservationProperties
description: JSON object of the `properties` (`parameters` in STA V1) property of an OGC STA `Observation` entity for the STAMPLATE profile

@context.description: reference to the STAMPLATE JSON-LD context

dataSource.description: additional information on the source of the observation, e.g., a file name

hasQualityMeasurement.description: quality measurement of this observation according to DQV

jsonld.id.description: IRI identifying this specific QualityMeasurement node

qualityAnnotation.description: annotation derived from dqv:value according to the ISO 19157 convention

qualitySchema.description: IRI of the dqv:Dimension this quality measurement is defined in

qualityProcedure.description: IRI of the dqv:Metric instance used to produce this quality measurement

hasQualitySetup.description: IRIs of the dqv:Metric instances that were used to produce all quality measurements for this observation
